description: A cover illustration with a soft pastel sky-like background in pink, purple, and blue tones. In the center is a large geometric triangular arch or stylized “A” shape outlined in light and glowing edges, reflected below on a glossy surface. The composition feels futuristic and minimal, with no labels, arrows, or numeric annotations. It serves as the main visual metaphor for progress and innovation.

Contents page with a blue-to-pink gradient background and faint geometric arrow/chevron shapes. Large section numbers and titles are arranged across the page in columns. The visible entries include 02 Progressing with Innovation, 04 About Info Edge, 08 MD & CEO's Message, 14 Key Performance Indicators, 24 Value Creation Model, 26 Business Vertical Review, 34 Investments, 42 Environment, 44 Social, 46 Governance, 50 Awards and Accolades, 52 Statutory Reports, and 225 Financial Statements. Under Financial Statements, subsections for Standalone and Consolidated are shown with lists of report items and page numbers.

title: Info Edge at a Glance infographic
description: Multiple highlighted metric cards on a soft gradient background. Sections include financial highlights, shareholder returns highlights, and investment highlights. Visible metrics include ₹28,817 Mn Standalone Billings, 56.3% Recruitment Operating PBT Margins, 36.7% Standalone Operating PBT margins, ₹47,857 Mn Cash Balance, ₹15.42 Earnings Per Share (EPS), 38.9% Dividend Payout Ratio, ₹6 Dividend Per Share, 110+ Active Investments, and ₹333 Bn Value of Investments in Listed Companies.

A business diagram titled “Our Businesses” showing four stacked colored segments arranged diagonally from top-left to bottom-right under the heading “Our Businesses.” The segments are labeled Recruitment, Real Estate, Matchmaking, and Education, each with a faint line icon: a magnifying glass/person for Recruitment, a house/hand for Real Estate, rings/hearts for Matchmaking, and a graduation cap/lightbulb for Education. To the right of each segment are associated business names: Recruitment includes Naukri, iimjobs, Hirist, NaukriGulf, Naukri Fast Forward, JobHai, AmbitionBox, Naukri Campus, DoSelect, Zwayam; Real Estate includes 99acres; Matchmaking includes Jeevansathi and Aisle; Education includes Shiksha. The layout suggests a grouped business portfolio rather than a process or flow, with the diagonal stack acting as the main organizing structure.

An icon-style illustration of an eye centered among four small connected nodes. The eye symbol is rendered in blue outline and suggests vision, observation, or insight. The style is simple, symbolic, and metaphorical rather than technical. It functions as the visual marker for the “Our Vision” section.

Portrait photo of a smiling middle-aged man wearing glasses, a navy blazer over a white shirt, and beige trousers, holding a white mug. He is standing against a light background with soft blue geometric shapes. The image is a formal corporate portrait with a clean studio-like look. Visible text in the image includes: "8".

A small circular decorative graphic containing a stylized quotation-mark icon in purple and blue gradients on a white background. It appears to function as a visual accent near a pull quote. No other text is visible.

A centered light-grey box containing a numbered list of four AI priorities: 1. Enhancing search quality, user personalisation and productivity across existing platforms; 2. Building new AI-powered features that improve user experience and engagement; 3. Creating entirely new products and monetisation levers powered by AI; 4. Leveraging AI internally to improve operational efficiency, decision-making speed and execution agility. A thin blue line appears along the bottom of the box.

title: PROFIT GENERATION BY INFO EDGE (₹ Mn)
MARKETING EXPENSE AS A % OF RESPECTIVE BUSINESS' NET REVENUES (%)
OPERATING PBT (₹ Mn)
description: Stacked bar chart showing Operating PBT in ₹ Mn across FY21 to FY25. The y-axis is Operating PBT values by business segment, with stacked components for Recruitment, Real Estate, Matchmaking, and Education, and a total shown above each year. A CAGR of 42.2% is shown.

title: OPERATING PBT MARGINS (%)
description: Line chart showing Operating PBT margins in percent across FY21 to FY25. Two series are plotted: Recruitment and Total Standalone. The Recruitment line stays above the Total Standalone line throughout. No dual axis is shown. The visible values are 51.6%, 56.9%, 59.9%, 58.2%, 56.3% for Recruitment and 21.1%, 26.8%, 34.1%, 36.6%, 36.7% for Total Standalone.

title: BILLINGS (₹ Mn)
description: Simple bar chart comparing billings in ₹ Mn for FY24 and FY25. FY24 is 6,127 and FY25 is 7,240. A YoY increase of 18.2% is shown.

title: CASH PROFITS / (LOSSES) FROM OPERATIONS (₹ Mn)
description: Simple bar chart comparing cash profits / losses from operations in ₹ Mn for FY24 and FY25. FY24 is (439) and FY25 is 206. A YoY increase of 147.0% is shown.

title: PROFIT AFTER TAXES (BEFORE EXCEPTIONAL ITEMS) (₹ Mn)
description: Bar chart showing Profit After Taxes (Before Exceptional Items) in ₹ Mn across FY21 to FY25. Values rise from 2,817 to 8,502, then end at 7,170 in FY25. A CAGR of 26.3% is shown.

title: EARNINGS PER SHARE* (₹)
description: Bar chart showing Earnings Per Share in ₹ across FY21 to FY25. Values rise steadily from 4.46 to 15.42. A CAGR of 36.4% is shown.

title: CASH FROM OPERATIONS (BEFORE TAXES) (₹ Mn)
description: Stacked bar chart showing Cash from operations before taxes in ₹ Mn across FY21 to FY25. The stacked components are Recruitment, Real Estate, Matchmaking, and Education, with a total shown above each year. A CAGR of 36.4% is shown.

title: CASH GENERATION AS A % OF BILLINGS (₹ Mn/%)
description: Stacked bar chart of Cash from Operations (before Taxes) as a % of Billings across FY21 to FY25, with Total Billings values shown for each year.

title: DIVIDEND PAID (₹ Mn)
description: Vertical bar chart showing Dividend Paid from FY21 to FY25, with a CAGR label of 39.4%.

title: DIVIDEND PER SHARE & DIVIDEND PAYOUT RATIO (₹/%)
description: Bar chart showing Dividend per Share and Dividend Payout Ratio across FY21 to FY25, with a CAGR label of 39.2%.

title: PERMANENT EMPLOYEE COUNT* (Nos.)
description: Vertical bar chart showing Permanent Employee Count from FY21 to FY25, with a footnote including Zwayam and Doselect employees.

title: STANDALONE BALANCE SHEET
description: Two donut charts comparing FY25 and FY24 composition for Assets and Liabilities, with supporting tables of particulars.

title: CONSOLIDATED BALANCE SHEET
description: Two donut charts comparing FY25 and FY24 composition for Assets and Liabilities, with supporting tables of particulars.
